english: like gró-ba (gro ba) in a more general sense: bzón-pa - la (bzhon pa la), číbs - la (chibs la) to ride in a carriage, on horseback Cs.
a place for walking, Lexx., Cs.

pf. bcáṅs (bcangs), fut. bčaṅ (bcang), imp. čóṅ(s) (chong(s)), 1. to hold, to keep, to take hold of, skrá-la (skra la) by the hair Mil. — °čaṅ-zúṅs ('chang zungs) handle, crook of a stick, Mil. — 2. to carry, to wear, to carry about one, e.g. amulets etc. — 3. (yíd - la) (yid la) to keep in memory, in one's mind. — 4. to have, to assume, e. g. the body of a goddess, of a Rakshasi Pth.
W. a (closed) handful e.g. of dough; *čáṅs-bu* (*changs bu*) a clod (of clay), a snow-ball etc. formed in the hand.

I. pf. čad (chad), vb. n. to gčód-pa (gcod pa), like čód-pa (chod pa), to be cut into pieces, to be cut off, to decay, dúm-bur (dum bur) (to fall) to pieces Med.; to cease, end, stop, of diseases Glr., of life Lex.; to cease to flow or to blow, of water or wind; to die away, to become extinct, of a family, a generation; to be consumed, of provisions Pth. of bodily strength Thgy.; to be decided, kyód - kyis bśád - par °čád - na (khyod kyis bshad par 'chad na) you being determined to kill me Dzl. -- II. pf. and fut. bśad (bshad), imp. śod (shod) 1. to explain, °óg-tu °čad ('og tu 'chad) it will be explained below Lt.; yíd - la byos śig daṅ bśád - do (yid la byos shig dang bshad do) give heed, and I will explain it to you Stg.; °čad nyán-pa ('chad nyan pa) to listen to an explanation Sch.; °jig čos gtam °čád-pa ('jig chos gtam 'chad pa) to teach the transitoriness of existence Sch. (?) -- 2. to tell, to relate.
pf. bcabs (bcabs), fut. bcab (bcab), imp. čob (chob) to conceal, to keep secret, °čáb-pa-med-pai sems ('chab pa med pa'i sems) a candid mind, open-heartedness Stg. (cog. to jáb-pa ('jab pa)).

I. vb. (pf. bčam (bcam) Lex.), also adj. and sbst. to accord, to agree, agreeing, agreement, sríd-la mi °čám-pas (srid la mi 'cham pas) as they did not agree about the government Glr.; °čam byéd-pa ('cham byed pa) to make agree, to reconcile Mil., *čam mi čam* (*cham mi cham*) col. they do not agree; k'a °čám-pa (kha 'cham pa) to agree upon, to concert, e.g. an escape; k'a °čám-par (kha 'cham par) by concert, unanimously. II. 1. to dance, °čám-par byéd-pa ('cham par byed pa) Sch. 2. a dancer, Kro °čám-pa (khro 'cham pa) a dancer with a frightful mask; gar-°čám(s) (gar 'cham(s)) a dance; °čám-po ('cham po) a dancer Glr.; °čam-dpón ('cham dpon) leader of a dance; °čám-yíg ('cham yig) book or programme of a dance.

I. pf. bčas (bcas), rarely °čas ('chas), fut. bča (bca'), imp čos (chos), to make, prepare, construct, but used only in reference to certain things; 1. gnas (gnas), vulg. tsaṅ (tsang), °čá-ba ('cha' ba) Pth. to prepare a place, house or abode, to settle; mal °čá-ba ('cha' ba) to make a bed or couch Cs.; dmag-sgár °čá-ba (dmag sgar 'cha' ba) to pitch a camp; kríms-ra °čá-ba (khrims ra 'cha' ba) to establish a court of justice Glr. -- 2. rgyal-kríms °čá-ba (rgyal khrims 'cha' ba) to draw up a law, to give laws, frq. -- 3. dam °čá-ba (dam 'cha' ba) to make a vow, to promise, assert, protest, frq; yi-dam °čá-ba (yi dam 'cha' ba) id.; also to utter a prayer; dám-bča (dam bca') v. sub dam. -- 4. skyil-kruṅ čá-ba (skyil krung 'cha' ba) = skyil-kruṅ byéd-pa (skyil krung byed pa), v. skyil-ba. -- 5. blo-gtád °čá-ba (blo gtad 'cha' ba), c. c. la, to place confidence in. II. to bite, gčig - la gčig °čá-žiṅ zá-la (gcig la gcig 'cha' zhing za la) to bite and devour one another Dzl.; so °čá-ba (so 'cha' ba) to bite with the teeth (?) Mng., or to gnash or grind the teeth (?); śiṅ °čá-ba (shing 'cha' ba) to gnaw at a piece of wood Stg.
or °čár-čán ('char can) a present given reluctantly Sch. (?)

pf. śar (shar), to rise, appear, become visible, of the sun etc., also of the sun's appearing above a mountain, from behind a cloud etc., frq.; to shine, gaṅs-ri-la nyi-ma śar-ba (gangs ri la nyi ma shar ba) the shining of the sun upon a mountain covered with snow, a snowy mountain lit up by the rays of the sun Glr.; gzugs-brnyán mi °čar-ba (gzugs brnyan mi 'char ba) the not appearing of the image which is formed by the reflection of a mirror (as something strange and surprising) Wdn; gzugs °čár-ba byéd-pa (gzugs 'char ba byed pa) to cause an image to be reflected (in the water);
